outputs.description: Unique identifier for the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.monitor_id Identifier of the monitoring source that generated the alert.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.id

outputs.description: Unique document ID associated with the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.__type Type of document associated with the alert.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.__id

outputs.description: Full content or message body of the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.channel_id ID of the channel where the alert was observed.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.body

outputs.description: Description of the channel where the alert was detected. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.channel_url URL of the detected channel.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.channel_info.description

outputs.description: Invite link of the detected channel, if available. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.messenger.id Identifier of the messenger platform linked to the alert.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.invite_url

outputs.description: Name of the messenger platform. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.name Name of the channel where the content was found.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.channel.messenger.name

outputs.description: Date Date and time when the document was ingested into the system. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.message_id
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.ingested

outputs.description: Identifier of the specific message triggering the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.messenger.id Messenger platform ID associated with the message.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Name of the messenger platform associated with the message. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.avatar_file.hashes.sha256 SHA-256 hash of the sender's avatar file.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.messenger.name

outputs.description: MIME type of the sender's avatar file. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.identity.first_name First name of the sender.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.avatar_file.mime_type

outputs.description: Last name of the sender. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.identity.name Full name of the sender.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.identity.last_name

outputs.description: Telegram username of the sender. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.telegram.user_id Telegram user ID of the sender.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.sender.telegram.name

outputs.description: Source of the document or content triggering the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.timestamp Date
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc.source

outputs.description: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.id Unique identifier of the label assigned to the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.classifier
outputs.name: Timestamp when the message or document was created.

outputs.description: Classifier name used for label assignment. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.version Version of the classifier or labeling process.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Name of the label assigned to the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.confidence Confidence score of the assigned label.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.label

outputs.description: Path of the element where the label was applied. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.id Unique identifier of the extracted topic.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels.element_path

outputs.description: Type of the extracted topic. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.value Value of the extracted topic.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.type

outputs.description: Name of the topic extraction tool. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.extractor_version Version of the topic extractor used.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.extractor

outputs.description: Path of the element where the entity was detected. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.entity_locations.offsets Character offsets of the detected entity in the document.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics.entity_locations.element_path

outputs.description: Identifier of the matched topic. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topic_matches.value Matched value for the topic.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topic_matches.topic_id

outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Value of the matched document content. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.tags List
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc_matches.locations.value

outputs.description: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.created_at Date Date and time when the alert was created.
outputs.name: Tags associated with the alert.

outputs.description: Date Date and time when the alert was last updated. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.labels_url
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.updated_at

outputs.description: URL to fetch labels associated with the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.topics_url URL to fetch topics associated with the alert.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: URL of the original document related to the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.status Current status of the alert (e.g., open, closed, triaged).
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.doc_url

outputs.description: Type or category of the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.alert_summary Summary of the alert.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.alert_type

outputs.description: Title of the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.email_sent_at Timestamp when the alert email was sent.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.title

outputs.description: Malicious score of the indicator related to the alert. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.severity Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high).
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.indicator_mscore

outputs.description: Confidence score of the alert detection. GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.aggregated_under_id ID under which the alert has been aggregated.
outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.confidence

outputs.name: GoogleThreatIntelligenceDTMAlerts.Alerts.similarity_score
